modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Measure the clamp input as `V(vin, vgnd)` and drive `V(vout, vgnd)` relative to the same reference.
When the referenced input lies inside `[vclamp_lower, vclamp_upper]`, pass that referenced voltage to the output.
When the referenced input is below `vclamp_lower`, drive the lower clamp value.
When the referenced input is above `vclamp_upper`, drive the upper clamp value.

title: Hard Voltage Clamp
